argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const allComments = []; const commentItems = document.querySelectorAll('li.comment-main-list-item'); commentItems.forEach((li) => { if (allComments.length >= limit) return; const commentId = li.getAttribute('data-comment-id') || ''; const userEl = li.querySelector('.comment-main-list-item-content-header h3 a'); const user = userEl ? userEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const contentEl = li.querySelector('.comment-main-list-item-content-comment span'); const content = contentEl ? contentEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const infoEl = li.querySelector('.content-info'); let time = ''; let location = ''; if (infoEl) { const infoText = infoEl.textContent.trim(); const parts = infoText.split('·'); time = parts[0]?.trim() || ''; location = parts[1]?.trim() || ''; } const likeEl = li.querySelector('.J_zan span'); const likes = likeEl ? parseInt(likeEl.textContent.trim()) || 0 : 0; const replies = []; const replyItems = li.querySelectorAll('.comment-main-list-item-child'); replyItems.forEach((reply) => { const replyUserEl = reply.querySelector('.comment-main-list-item-content-header h3 a'); const replyUser = replyUserEl ? replyUserEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const replyContentEl = reply.querySelector('.comment-main-list-item-content-comment span'); const replyContent = replyContentEl ? replyContentEl.textContent.trim() : ''; const replyInfoEl = reply.querySelector('.content-info'); let replyTime = ''; if (replyInfoEl) { const replyInfoText = replyInfoEl.textContent.trim(); const parts = replyInfoText.split('·'); replyTime = parts[0]?.trim() || ''; } replies.push({ user: replyUser, content: replyContent, time: replyTime }); }); allComments.push({ rank: allComments.length + 1, commentId, user, content, time, location, likes, replies }); }); return allComments; }
